examples: Brown bears eat everything from caribou to berries.
Populations of lemmings, caribou and red knot (a shorebird) have all decreased.
Every caribou knew when it was time to run and in which direction to go, even if it didn't know exactly why.
They could be asking fans to post their favorite memory of Caribou stores that are closing.
Things started going wrong for Caribou well before it started putting up clueless Facebook posts.
